name: phone-at-salon-booking-tool-side-channels-into-contact
description: User is at SALON_BOOKING_TOOL (after the salon flow asked 'do you use a booking tool?'). They send their phone in a separate message instead of answering. Bot must side-channel the phone into contactPhone AND stay at SALON_BOOKING_TOOL to keep asking the booking question. Earlier behavior: bare phone landed in the booking-intent LLM as 'unclear', triggered a re-ask, dropped the phone. Format short-circuit fixes this without a Wikipedia call.
